content: nature inspired atmospheric organicism: A nature-inspired atmospheric product advertisement for "{argument name="brand name" default="VERDANA Organic Baby Skincare"}". A small amber glass bottle and a matching cream jar rest beautifully nestled inside a bed of {argument name="botanical elements" default="fresh green sage leaves, sprigs of dried purple lavender, and draped soft white linen cloth"}, all placed on a warm, sunlit rustic wooden surface. The background is in soft-focus with a shallow depth of field, featuring blurred terracotta wall textures accented with climbing ivy. Hand-drawn, illustrative typography reading exactly "{argument name="slogan" default="GROWN FROM THE EARTH"}" floats gently above the products in slightly imperfect, organic, elegant letterforms. The overall color palette is muted and earthy, heavily featuring sage green, terracotta, warm ochre, and slate cream. Broad natural window lighting creates a soft, honest, and evenly diffused illumination across the scene. The image features a subtle chalk and watercolor paper texture overlay, offering an open, airy composition with generous negative space, evoking a deep sense of warmth, purity, and calm. Moderately high artistic stylization. 4:5 Aspect Ratio.

content: Ultra-realistic top-down product photography of a neatly folded V-neck t-shirt placed on a light wooden surface. The t-shirt is pastel teal/washed aqua color with a soft fabric texture and subtle faded shading. On the front print: a group of 8 highly detailed, stylized cartoon-realistic cats arranged closely together, facing forward. Each cat has exaggerated, expressive facial features — big glossy eyes, wide pupils, quirky crossed eyes, and playful goofy expressions. Several cats have their tongues sticking out in different directions, creating a humorous and chaotic vibe. Cat details: Mixed fur colors: ginger/orange tabby, cream, beige, light brown, and grey tones Soft, fluffy fur with hyper-detailed strands Rounded faces, small noses, and slightly chubby cheeks Variety of expressions: surprised, confused, silly, excited One or two cats looking slightly cross-eyed High emotional exaggeration, almost Pixar-style but more detailed Composition: Cats tightly grouped in a triangular cluster filling the chest print area Bottom row slightly cropped by shirt fold for realism Balanced spacing with layered depth (front and back rows) Lighting: Soft diffused studio lighting Gentle shadows under the folds and around the print Even illumination, no harsh contrast Style: Hyper-realistic + stylized 3D illustration blend High resolution, crisp details, professional product mockup Clean background, minimalistic aesthetic Camera: Top-down flat lay shot Slight perspective depth but mostly symmetrical Quality tags: 8K, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, photorealistic fabric texture, professional e-commerce product shot.

description: A professional product photography prompt for a teal t-shirt featuring a cluster of expressive cartoon cats.
